debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_4
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝² : DiscreteMeasurableSpace α
inst✝¹ : Fintype α
f g : α → ℝ
p q : ENNReal
inst✝ : p.HolderConjugate q
⊢ wInner cWeight f g ≤ ↑‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ↑‖g‖ₙ_[q]

failed_attempts:
calc
    ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := by
      simp [cL1Norm_mul, wInner_cWeight_eq_expect, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_mul]
      gcongr
      exact le_abs_self _
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := cLpNorm_mul_le f g

calc
    ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := by
      simp [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect, cL1Norm_eq_expect_nnnorm]
      gcongr
      exact le_abs_self _
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := cL1Norm_mul_le p q f g

calc
    ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := by
      simp only [cL1Norm_mul, wInner_cWeight_eq_expect, expect]
      gcongr with a
      exact le_abs_self _
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := cL1Norm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm

calc
    ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := by
      simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect, cL1Norm_eq_expect_nnnorm, NNReal.coe_expect,
        NNReal.coe_nnnorm]
      gcongr
      exact le_abs_self _
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by
      rw [← NNReal.coe_mul, NNReal.coe_le_coe]
      exact cL1Norm_mul_le p q f g

end Real
end MeasureTheory

rw [wInner_cWeight_eq_smul_wInner_one, cLpNorm_eq_dLpNorm_mul_card_rpow_neg,
    cLpNorm_eq_dLpNorm_mul_card_rpow_neg]
  push_cast
  simp_rw [smul_eq_mul, ← mul_assoc, mul_right_comm _ _ (↑‖g‖_[q]), mul_assoc (↑‖f‖_[p]),
    ← ENNReal.rpow_add _ _ (by simp) (by simp), HolderConjugate.inv_add_inv, ENNReal.rpow_one,
    mul_comm (↑(card α)⁻¹) _, ← mul_assoc]
  gcongr
  exact wInner_one_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm _ _

calc
    ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := by
      simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect, cL1Norm_eq_expect_nnnorm]
      gcongr with i
      exact le_abs_self _
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := cL1Norm_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm p q f g

rw [wInner_cWeight_eq_smul_wInner_one, cLpNorm_eq_smul_dLpNorm, cLpNorm_eq_smul_dLpNorm]
  refine (ENNReal.mul_le_mul (le_refl _) (wInner_one_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm _ _ _ _)).trans_eq ?_
  rw [← mul_assoc, mul_comm _ (card α : ℝ≥0∞)⁻¹, mul_assoc, ← ENNReal.rpow_add _ _ (by simp), HolderConjugate.inv_add_inv, ENNReal.rpow_one]

simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_smul_wInner_one, cLpNorm_eq_smul_dLpNorm]
  refine (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (wInner_one_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLqNorm _ _) (by simp)).trans_eq ?_
  rw [← mul_assoc, mul_right_comm _ (dLpNorm _ _), mul_assoc, ← mul_assoc (dLpNorm _ _)]
  congr 2
  rw [← ENNReal.rpow_add _ _ (by simp) (by simp), p.inv_add_inv_conj, ENNReal.rpow_one]

calc
    ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := by
      simp [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect, cL1Norm_eq_expect_nnnorm]
      gcongr
      norm_cast
      exact le_abs_self _
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by
      mod_cast cL1Norm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm

rw [wInner_cWeight_eq_smul_wInner_one, cLpNorm_eq_smul_dLpNorm, cLpNorm_eq_smul_dLpNorm]
  rw [ENNReal.ofReal_smul (inv_nonneg.2 (Nat.cast_nonneg _)), ENNReal.ofReal_inv_nat_cast, smul_eq_mul]
  rw [← mul_assoc, ← ENNReal.rpow_add _ _ (by simp) (by simp), HolderConjugate.inv_add_inv,
    ENNReal.rpow_one, mul_assoc]
  gcongr
  exact wInner_one_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm _ _

simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_smul_wInner_one, cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm, expect, smul_eq_mul]
  rw [ENNReal.ofReal_mul (inv_nonneg.mpr (Nat.cast_nonneg _)),
    ENNReal.ofReal_inv_of_pos (Nat.cast_pos.mpr Fintype.card_pos)]
  simp only [ENNReal.mul_rpow_of_nonneg _ _ (by simp [ENNReal.inv_ne_top]), ← dLpNorm_eq_sum_nnnorm]
  rw [mul_mul_mul_comm, ← ENNReal.rpow_add _ _ (by simp) ENNReal.coe_ne_top,
    HolderConjugate.inv_add_inv, ENNReal.rpow_one]
  gcongr
  exact wInner_one_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm p q f g

calc
    ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := by
      rw [cL1Norm_mul, wInner_cWeight_eq_expect, wInner_cWeight_eq_expect]
      refine expect_le_expect fun i _ ↦ ?_
      simp only [norm_eq_abs, ← abs_mul, le_abs_self]
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := cL1Norm_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm

calc
    (⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] : ℝ≥0∞) ≤ ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := by
      rw [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect, cL1Norm_eq_expect_nnnorm]
      exact ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (expect_le_expect fun i _ ↦ le_abs_self _)
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := cL1Norm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm p q f g

calc
    _ ≤ (‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] : ℝ≥0∞) := by
      simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect, cL1Norm_eq_expect_nnnorm]
      gcongr
      apply le_abs_self
    _ ≤ _ := cL1Norm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm p q f g

calc
    ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := by
      simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect, cL1Norm_eq_expect_nnnorm, Real.coe_nnnorm]
      exact expect_le_expect fun i _ ↦ le_abs_self _
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := mod_cast cL1Norm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLqNorm f g

simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_smul_wInner_one, cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm, expect,
    smul_eq_mul, ← NNReal.coe_mul, ← NNReal.mul_rpow, dLpNorm_eq_sum_nnnorm, card_univ]
  rw [NNReal.mul_rpow, NNReal.mul_rpow, mul_comm ((_ : ℝ≥0) ^ _), mul_assoc,
    ← NNReal.rpow_add _ _ (by simp [card_ne_zero]), ENNReal.toReal_inv_add_inv, NNReal.rpow_one,
    ← mul_assoc]
  gcongr
  exact wInner_one_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm _ _

calc
    ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := by
      rw [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect, cL1Norm_eq_expect_nnnorm]
      refine expect_le_expect fun i _ ↦ ?_
      simp only [coe_nnnorm, le_norm_self]
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by
      push_cast
      exact cL1Norm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm p q f g

simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_smul_wInner_one, cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm, expect,
    dLpNorm_eq_sum_nnnorm, smul_eq_mul, ← ENNReal.toReal_mul,
    ← ENNReal.mul_rpow_of_ne_top (by simp) (by simp),
    ← ENNReal.rpow_add _ _ (by simp) (by simp), HolderConjugate.inv_add_inv_conj,
    ENNReal.rpow_one]
  gcongr
  exact wInner_one_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm _ _

rw [wInner_cWeight_eq_smul_wInner_one, cLpNorm_eq_card_rpow_inv_mul_dLpNorm _ p,
    cLpNorm_eq_card_rpow_inv_mul_dLpNorm _ q]
  rw [← mul_assoc, ← ENNReal.toReal_mul, ← ENNReal.rpow_add _ _ (by simp) (by simp),
    HolderConjugate.inv_add_inv, ENNReal.rpow_one, ENNReal.toReal_inv, ENNReal.toReal_natCast]
  gcongr
  exact wInner_one_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm _ _ _ _

calc
    (⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] : ℝ≥0∞) ≤ ⟪fun i ↦ ‖f i‖, fun i ↦ ‖g i‖⟫ₙ_[ℝ] := by
      norm_cast; gcongr; exact le_abs_self _
    _ = ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := (cL1Norm_mul f g).symm
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by
      simp only [cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm, expect, smul_eq_mul, ← ENNReal.coe_mul,
        ENNReal.mul_rpow_of_nonneg _ _ (by simp), card_univ]
      rw [mul_assoc, mul_comm _ ((_ : ℝ≥0∞) ^ _), mul_assoc, ← mul_assoc ((_ : ℝ≥0∞) ^ _),
        ← ENNReal.rpow_add _ _ (by simp) (by simp), HolderConjugate.inv_add_inv,
        ENNReal.rpow_one]
      gcongr
      exact ENNReal.sum_mul_le_Lp_mul_Lq _ _

simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_smul_wInner_one, cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm, expect, smul_eq_mul,
    ← NNReal.mul_rpow, mul_mul_mul_comm]
  simp only [NNReal.mul_rpow, ← dLpNorm_eq_sum_nnnorm, card_univ]
  rw [← NNReal.rpow_add (Or.inr one_ne_zero), ← ENNReal.toReal_add (by simp [ENNReal.inv_ne_top])
    (by simp [ENNReal.inv_ne_top]), IsConjExponent.one_div_add_one_div, ENNReal.one_toReal,
    NNReal.rpow_one]
  gcongr
  exact wInner_one_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm _ _

by_cases hα : (card α : ℝ≥0∞) = 0
  · simp [cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm, expect, hα]
  · simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_smul_wInner_one, cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm, expect, card_univ,
      smul_eq_mul]
    rw [ENNReal.ofReal_mul (inv_nonneg.2 (Nat.cast_nonneg _))]
    rw [ENNReal.mul_rpow_of_nonneg _ _ (by simp), ENNReal.mul_rpow_of_nonneg _ _ (by simp)]
    rw [← mul_assoc (↑(card α)⁻¹ : ℝ≥0∞), ← ENNReal.rpow_add _ _ (by simp [hα]) (by simp),
        HolderConjugate.inv_add_inv p q, ENNReal.rpow_one]
    gcongr
    rw [← dLpNorm_eq_sum_nnnorm, ← dLpNorm_eq_sum_nnnorm]
    exact wInner_one_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm _ _

rw [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect, cLpNorm_eq_snorm, cLpNorm_eq_snorm]
  refine (ennnorm_integral_le_lintegral_ennnorm _).trans ?_
  rw [← snorm_one_eq_lintegral_nnnorm]
  exact snorm_mul_le_snorm_mul_snorm f g

simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_smul_wInner_one, cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm, expect,
    dLpNorm_eq_sum_nnnorm, card_univ, smul_eq_mul]
  rw [ENNReal.mul_rpow_of_ne_top, ENNReal.mul_rpow_of_ne_top]
  rotate_left
  · exact ENNReal.inv_ne_top
  · exact (sum_ne_top _).ne
  · exact ENNReal.inv_ne_top
  · exact (sum_ne_top _).ne
  rw [← mul_assoc, ← mul_assoc, mul_right_comm _ (↑(card α)⁻¹ ^ (1 / q).toReal), mul_assoc,
    ← ENNReal.toReal_mul, ← ENNReal.rpow_add _ _ ENNReal.inv_ne_zero ENNReal.inv_ne_top,
    ← ENNReal.toReal_add ENNReal.inv_ne_top ENNReal.inv_ne_top, ENNReal.inv_add_inv_eq_one,
    ENNReal.one_toReal, ENNReal.rpow_one, ENNReal.toReal_mul, mul_assoc]
  gcongr
  exact wInner_one_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm _ _

simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect, cL1Norm_eq_expect_nnnorm, coe_nnnorm, norm_mul,
        Real.norm_eq_abs]
      exact expect_le_expect fun i ↦ le_abs_self _
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := cL1Norm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm

calc
    ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := by
      simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect, cL1Norm_eq_expect_nnnorm]
      norm_cast
      exact expect_le_expect fun i _ ↦ le_abs_self _
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by
      norm_cast
      exact cL1Norm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm p q f g

simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect, cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm, expect, smul_eq_mul, card_univ]
  rw [NNReal.mul_rpow, NNReal.mul_rpow, ← mul_assoc, ← NNReal.rpow_add _ _ (inv_ne_zero (Nat.cast_ne_zero.2 Fintype.card_ne_zero)), ENNReal.HolderConjugate.inv_add_inv, NNReal.rpow_one, mul_le_mul_left (inv_pos.2 (Nat.cast_pos.2 Fintype.card_pos))]
  exact wInner_one_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm _ _

calc
    ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ⟪fun i ↦ ‖f i‖, fun i ↦ ‖g i‖⟫ₙ_[ℝ] := by
      simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect, expect]; gcongr; exact le_abs_self _
    _ = ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := (cL1Norm_mul f g).symm
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := cL1Norm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm p q

simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_smul_wInner_one, cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm, expect, smul_eq_mul,
    ← NNReal.coe_mul, ← NNReal.mul_rpow, NNReal.mul_mul_mul_comm]
  refine (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (wInner_one_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm p q f g) (by positivity)).trans_eq ?_
  rw [← NNReal.rpow_add (by positivity), ← ENNReal.toReal_add, HolderConjugate.inv_add_inv_eq_one,
    ENNReal.one_toReal, NNReal.rpow_one]
  all_goals exact ENNReal.inv_ne_top.mpr (HolderConjugate.ne_zero _)

calc
    ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ⟪fun i ↦ ‖f i‖, fun i ↦ ‖g i‖⟫ₙ_[ℝ] := by
      simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect]
      exact expect_le_expect fun i _ ↦ le_abs_self _
    _ = ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := (cL1Norm_mul f g).symm
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := cLpNorm_mul_le p q f g

calc
    ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := by
      simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect, cL1Norm_eq_expect_nnnorm, norm_mul, Real.norm_eq_abs]
      gcongr
      exact le_abs_self _
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm p q f g
